violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC informed; utensils brought to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the cold drawers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
Scoop handle in sugar container was in direct contact with contents. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

The hand sinks in the women's toilet room are lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands is required at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, donut display case, and counter near the sugar dispenser have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The PVC pipe below coffee makers in the front service area is in poor repair, dripping water into a pan on the shelf below. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
